subject: The Dized tutorial for Splendor is now available!

posts.body:
We've just released the tutorial for the game: it's available on our mobile app and directly online if you're using a computer. As all Dized tutorial, it's meant to be used during your first game, teaching all players at the same time as they're playing, while adapting to their choices. 🤓
And for your next games, you can always use the interactive rules (still in the app or online) to quickly find the answer to any question you might have about a specific rule. 🙂
Please tell us what you think and feel free to give any feedback you might have – unlike a printed rulebook, it's quite easy to update… 😉
